title: Discovery Session (30 min)
description: A focused call to clarify your goals, ask questions, and see if ongoing coaching is the right fit—ideal if you are new to Namrata’s work.

title: Signature 1:1 Intensive
description: A deep-dive session for voice, self-image, and next-step clarity—ideal before launches, interviews, or camera work.

title: Expression Studio (3-pack)
description: Three sessions to build sustainable presence—perfect for women ready to compound their confidence over time.
